data.title: Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US Stock ETF Approved, Investing in Assets Beyond BTC and ETH
data.description: Nate Geraci, president of The ETF Store, announced in a post that the Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF has been approved under the SEC's new universal listing standards. The product will be able to hold crypto assets other than BTC and ETH, including XRP, SOL, and XLM.

data.title: One address bought GAIN at a low price and made a floating profit of $107,000 in one hour.
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Ai Yi @ai_9684 xtpa, the address 0x951…141de bought GAIN almost at the short-term bottom, investing $20,200 at an average price of $0.00625. The floating profit reached $107,000 within an hour, with a return rate of approximately 530%. No selling action has been seen so far.

data.title: Tether Treasury Mints $1 Billion USDT on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert reported that at 10:22 AM UTC+8, Tether Treasury minted 1 billion USDT on the Ethereum blockchain, valued at approximately $1.00345 billion.

data.title: GAIN Project Faces Major Security Breach Due to Configuration Error
data.description: According to PANews, the GAIN project has suffered a significant security breach due to a LayerZero Peer configuration error. Analysis by GoPlus reveals that attackers exploited this vulnerability by initializing an additional Peer on the Ethereum blockchain and minting TTTTT tokens. This allowed them to bypass cross-chain verification and excessively issue 5 billion GAIN tokens on the Binance Smart Chain. The incident bears similarities to the previous Yala attack, resulting in a dramatic price drop of over 90% for GAIN. Users are advised to temporarily cease interactions with the project to prevent potential losses.

data.title: Trader Bonk Guy once bought 3.246 million ASTER at an average price of $0.0922
data.description: Trader Bonk Guy posted on the X platform to clarify that there were misunderstandings regarding his ASTER transactions. He stated that he had purchased approximately 3.246 million ASTER tokens, with a transaction value of approximately $299,000 and an average purchase price of $0.0922. His current position has a floating profit of approximately $7.1 million, having established a position a week ago. He added that he had only previously consolidated the tokens and transferred them to a public wallet, not opened a new position.

data.title: Planet Morning News | September 25
data.description: 1. Bitwise: Ethereum treasury strategies are becoming mainstream, and ETH is no longer limited to hedging or speculation tools. 2. The US government may face its first shutdown since the winter of 2018-19. 3. Meteora proposes to distribute 3% of TGE reserves to Jupiter stakers in the form of liquidity position NFTs. 4. US Senator Warren calls for an investigation into the Trump family's overseas cryptocurrency transactions. 5. GSR submits an application to the US SEC to launch a digital asset treasury company ETF and multiple crypto funds. 6. CZ: Reachme's performance has fallen short of expectations, and the project is advised to explore token issuance after achieving product-market fit. 8. Solana treasury company SOL Strategies plans to raise $25 million through a rights offering to increase its SOL holdings. 9. CleanSpark shareholders have been granted permission to file a class action lawsuit, accusing the company of misleading investors with its Bitcoin transition. 10. Aster: Increase the weighting of holding time points to 5x. 11. Franklin Templeton integrated the Benji platform into BNB Chain; 12. Stablecorp completed a strategic round of financing of approximately US$3.6 million, led by FTP Ventures; 13. The board of directors of SOL Treasury DeFi Development approved a US$100 million share repurchase; 14. SUI Group disclosed that it holds over 105 million SUI tokens, with a holding value of nearly US$360 million; 15. Bloomberg analysts: ETFs have additional advantages over crypto tokens, such as regulatory protection; 16. Hyperliquid's stablecoin USDH officially launched after winning a bid on Native Markets; 17. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority: Currently, no offshore RMB stablecoins are issued in Hong Kong; 18. K33: The derivatives market reflects defensiveness and remains cautious about the recent performance of BTC; 19. Amplify ETFs submitted an application to the US SEC for a SOL and XRP options income ETF; 20. Blockchain analysis company Elliptic received a strategic investment from HSBC; 21. Big Pi, a company specializing in blockchain and other fields 22. Stablecoin startup Bastion secured $14.6 million in funding, led by Coinbase; 23. Solana ecosystem perpetual contract DEX BULK secured $8 million in seed funding, led by Robot Ventures and others; 24. Nasdaq-listed company Iveda announced the establishment of a cryptocurrency treasury; 25. Crypto computing development company Belfort secured $6 million in seed funding, led by Vsquared Ventures; 26. Prediction market Melee secured $3.5 million in funding, with participation from Variant and others.

data.title: Gold hits most overbought level in 45 years as ETF demand spikes
data.description:
Gold just broke yet another record. As of this week, it hit its most overbought level in 45 years, with a monthly RSI of 89. 72. That’s the highest RSI for gold since 1980. Anyone who follows charts knows that anything above 70 usually signals overbought territory. So, near 90? That’s insane. And this is happening […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gold-most-overbought-level-in-45-years/

data.title: Coinbase, Sony Get In On The Stablecoin Action
data.description:
Stablecoin infrastructure provider Bastion announced a $14. 6 million funding round led by Coinbase Ventures, with participation from Sony’s venture arm, Samsung Next, a16z Crypto, and Hashed, as Fortune Crypto reported on Sept. 24
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/24/coinbase-sony-get-in-on-the-stablecoin-action/

data.title: GAIN crashes 95% after malicious issuance of 5 billion tokens, hackers cash out $3.01 million
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai Yi @ai_9684 xtpa, the address 0xf3d…58db2 maliciously issued 5 billion GAIN tokens two hours ago and then quickly sold them, causing a 95% price flash crash and cashing out approximately $3.01 million. The address was created 11 hours ago, with funds originating from ETH received from Tornado 13 hours prior and then converted to BNB via Symbiosis. The hacker began selling 22 minutes after the issuance at 7:04 AM and continued for approximately 55 minutes. The hacker is currently transferring profits to Solana, Ethereum, Base, and Arbitrum networks via deBridge. Analysts believe this operation more closely resembles the exploitation of a contract vulnerability than the actions of the project itself. The details await official confirmation.

data.title: Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF Gains SEC Approval
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nate Geraci, President of The ETF Store, announced via Twitter that the Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF has received approval under the new general listing standards of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This ETF will be able to hold various cryptocurrencies beyond Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH), including assets like XRP, Solana (SOL), and Stellar (XLM).

data.title: UXLINK completes new contract deployment and announces token migration and compensation plan
data.description: UXLINK released an update stating that it has completed the deployment of a new smart contract (address: 0x3991…Feb 3) and submitted the incident report and migration plan to DAXA and several major exchanges. Legally circulating tokens will be exchanged at a 1:1 ratio, with a total supply of 479,713,462 tokens. Illegally issued and stolen tokens will not be exchanged, and some have been suspended from circulation. The official on-chain exchange portal will be launched within five business days. The team will also launch a compensation plan based on recovered assets and is working with regulators in Singapore, South Korea, and Japan to freeze wallets related to the hack.

data.title: China’s year-end bond supply set to shrink
data.description:
China’s bond issuance is set to shrink sharply by year-end, leaving only 16% of the annual quota.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinas-year-end-bond-supply-set-to-shrink/

data.title: Most crypto stocks fell at the close of the US stock market, with HODL down 12.59%.
data.description: According to MyStonks data, at the close of US stocks, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.37% to 46,121 points; the S&P 500 fell 0.28% to 6,637 points; and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.33% to 22,497 points. BitMine fell approximately 4.72% to $51.92; HODL fell approximately 12.59% to 6.94 Canadian dollars; BTCS rose approximately 6.83% to $4.85; and ALTS fell approximately 9.28% to $3.42. MyStonks is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: After losing $35.84 million on ETH long positions, traders went long again, opening at $4,178 and only $100 away from the liquidation price.
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Ember @EmberCN, a trader who had previously lost $35.84 million on ETH long positions and another $7.5 million on BTC short positions opened another long position of 15,700 ETH (worth approximately $65.4 million) 5 hours ago. The opening price was $4,178 and the liquidation price was $4,078, a difference of only $100.
